summary: Iteration 22 - Page Split Validation (Stato Rete + Connettori). Frontend-only testing. Successfully validated the split of ConnectorsPage into two separate pages: 'Stato Rete' (device monitoring per client at /network-status) and 'Connettori' (connector agent management at /connectors). All features working correctly.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom navigation - this is an external badge, not an app issue

stato_rete_page: Page accessible at /network-status via sidebar nav 'Stato Rete'
Page title: 'Stato Rete' with subtitle 'Monitoraggio dispositivi per cliente'
Summary cards: Dispositivi (8), Raggiungibili (8), Non raggiung. (0)
Each device shows: IP, name, SNMP/PING badge, OK/NON RAGGIUNGIBILE status
Devices: HPEOfficeConnect Switch (SNMP), NETGEAR switches (PING), iLO IFIXITGESTSRV3 (SNMP), Zyxel USG (SNMP)
Toolbar buttons: Aggiorna, Scansione Rete, + Dispositivo
Web Console and Delete buttons per device
connettori_page: Page accessible at /connectors via sidebar nav 'Connettori'
Page title: 'Connettori' with subtitle 'Gestione agent 86NocConnector installati'
Update management section: version input, file upload, publish button
Installed connectors list: IFIXITGESTSRV3 (86BIT_Office, OFFLINE, v1.9.0)
mobile_navigation: Mobile bottom nav has 5 items: Home, Alert, Rete, Clienti, Menu
All 4 nav groups visible in mobile sidebar

critical_code_review_comments: Page split implemented correctly - ClientStatusPage.js handles device monitoring, ConnectorsPage.js handles connector management
Sidebar nav updated with 'Stato Rete' (WifiHigh icon) in Monitoraggio group
Mobile nav updated with 'Rete' item pointing to /network-status
Both pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Summary cards show correct counts from API data
Device list shows SNMP/PING badges and OK/NON RAGGIUNGIBILE status correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Page split validated. 'Stato Rete' page at /network-status shows device monitoring per client (8 devices under 86BIT_Office). 'Connettori' page at /connectors shows connector agent management (1 connector IFIXITGESTSRV3, offline). Both pages have proper summary cards, toolbars, and data display. Mobile nav has 5 items with 'Rete' for network status.

features: Device details: IP, name, SNMP/PING badge, status
